titleStmt.title: SII 9.478: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 478. (A.R. No. 27 of 1928.) ON A SLAB PLANTED BEHIND THE ANJANEYA TEMPLE AT BELAGUPPA, KALYANADRUG TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated • • • • Śukla, Pushya, ba. 2, the Śaka year being badly damaged. It refers itself to the reign of Vīra-Narasiṅgadēva-Mahārāya and records that Haḍapada-Gaura-Nāyaka made a grant of the village Beḷuguppe, surnamed Vīra-Narasiṅgadēva-Mahārāyapura, situated in the division of (?) Būduguppe in Kundurupe-sīme to the aseetic Mallikārjunadēva as a maṭha-pura. The gift was made for the merit of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti . śrījayābhyadaya
śālivāhanaśakavaruṣaṁgaḷu
kke saluva śuklasaṁvatsarada puśya ba 2
śrīmatu mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara
śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīranarasiṁgadēvamahā
rāyaru Ūḷigada haḍapada gauranākkarū
ti rū ceṁnamallikārjunadēvara siṣyaru
kārjunadēvarige kōṭipuravargada grāma
dharmaśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare naṁma nāyakata
nakke saluva kuṁdurupeya sīmeya būduguppeya
da beḷuguppe Eṁba grāmakke vīranarasiṁgarāyapu
raveṁba pratināmavanū koṭu �yo vīranarasiṁgarāyapu
ravanu niṁma grāmake tathātithiyalā vīranarasiṁgadēvamahārā
yarige śukrutavāgabēkeṁdu nimage manaḥpuravāgi sahira(ṁ)ṇyō
dakadānadhārāpūrvakavāgi koṭṭeU beḷuguppe Eṁba grāmakke pratināmavanu vīranarasiṁgadēvama
hārāyapurakke saluva catusīme voḷagaṇa nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāṣāṇa Akṣīṇi
Āgāmi siddha sādhyagaḷeṁba Aṣṭabhōgatējasvāmyavanū Āgumāḍikoṁḍu Anu
bhavisūdu Eṁdu haḍapada gauranāyka tirumalanāyakaru bāḷamallikārju
nadēvarige maṭhapuravāgi beḷaguppe Eṁba grāmakke pratināmavāda
vīranarasiṁgadēvamahā lāni
Ā puravanū niya kaiyali Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyi Āgi
sūdu Aṁtu haḍapada nāyakarū tiṁmapanāyakarū bāḷamallikārjunadē
varige puravargavāgi koṭa dharmaśāsana Ī dharmakke Ārobarū Aḷupidavaru
kāśīkṣētradali gaṁgātīradali maṇikarṇikeyali taṁma mātāpitrugaḷanū taṁma makka
ḷugaḷanū taṁma kaiyāre taṁma davaru svadattādvigu
ṇaṁ pu(ṁ)ṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa svadatta
ṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānāśrēyōnupā
lanaṁ dānāt svargamavāpnōti pālanādacutaṁ padaṁ . svadattāṁ
paradatāṁ vā yō harētu vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrā
ṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi dharmaśāsana
mūṟunāḍu svāmi voppa
Digital edition of SII 9.478 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
